title: End Ore
description: To…The…Beginning… To the end. — Shard of Dominance
body:
The title name of this mod 'End Ore' is a placeholder

![To the beginning. To the end, Made with Ewan Howell's Minecraft Title Generator addon for Blockbench, and Krita
](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/190901388a46f7cd896b4b7dbbc59a0bc48bb000.png)
> Made with Ewan Howell's Minecraft Title Generator addon for Blockbench, and Krita
> 
# Begin at The End...

## Mods recommended:
## 

## Shaders recommended:
[BSL shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bsl-shaders)
## 

This mod works with Epic Fight!(Soon)

optional mods: Weapons of Miracles, YDM's Weapon Master, Vampirism, Traveler's Titles (Forge), [Shoulder Surfing Reloaded](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shoulder-surfing-reloaded)

Optifine crashes the game in this mod, when WOM is used, if you want zoom in minecraft, please use the [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom) instead

Ideas and thanks to: Weapons of Miracles, Epic Fight, Player Animator, Geckolib, Objmc, blender, krita

All animations are made with: Blender and Player Animatior
